question: At a party where you know very few people, you usually:

options.A: Start talking to several people right away
options.B: Talk to a few people after a short warm-up
options.C: Stay mostly with one person if possible
options.D: Prefer to stay quiet and avoid too many interactions

question: After spending a long day with many people, you usually feel:

options.A: Energized and ready to keep socializing
options.C: Drained and in need of quiet time
options.D: Very exhausted and wanting to be alone

question: When meeting someone new, you usually:

options.A: Find it easy to start the conversation
options.B: Can do it, but need a little time
options.D: Feel uncomfortable and avoid it if possible

question: In a group conversation, you usually:

options.A: Speak a lot and naturally take part
options.B: Join in when you have something to say
options.D: Prefer not to speak unless necessary

question: If you have free time on a weekend, you would rather:

options.A: Go out and meet many people
options.B: Do something social with a small group
options.C: Spend time with one close person

question: When entering a room full of strangers, you usually:

options.B: Feel okay after a few minutes
options.D: Feel strongly uneasy and want to leave

question: If someone does not reply quickly in a conversation, you tend to:

options.D: Feel quite self-conscious or anxious about it

question: When working on a project, you usually prefer:

options.C: Mostly independent work with occasional discussion

question: If you have to make the first move in a conversation, you usually feel:
At social events, you usually stay:

options.A: Until the end and enjoy it
options.B: For a good amount of time

question: If you are in a new class or workplace, you usually:

options.A: Introduce yourself to many people quickly
options.B: Start interacting after observing a little
options.C: Wait for others to approach you

question: When you receive an invitation to a large gathering, your first reaction is usually:
If a conversation becomes very lively and everyone is talking, you usually:

options.B: Try to follow and contribute when possible

question: When you need to recharge emotionally, you usually prefer:

options.B: Being with one or two close people
options.C: A mix of solitude and limited contact

question: When starting a conversation with someone you like, you usually:

options.A: Feel confident and do it easily
options.B: Feel a little nervous but still try
options.C: Hesitate a lot before doing it
options.D: Avoid doing it unless absolutely necessary
